title: Design System: Maa Ādya Mahākālī Sahasranāma

display.purpose: Hero naming and major devotional entry points.

body.purpose: Primary reading copy and explanatory text.

label.purpose: Buttons, toggles, and compact UI controls.

shadows.name: reading-surface
shadows.purpose: Name cards and dense reading modules.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main devotional call to action used for the reading path.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--color-crimson,#dc143c) 0%,var(--color-blood-red,#8b0000) 100%);color:var(--color-text-primary,#f5f5f5);padding:18px 40px;border-radius:9999px;border:2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2);font:600 0.9375rem/1.4 -apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,'Segoe UI',Roboto,Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif;box-shadow:0 4px 18px rgba(220,20,60,0.42),inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.2);cursor:pointer;transition:transform .3s ease,box-shadow .3s ease,border-color .3s ease}.ds-btn-primary:hover{transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(220,20,60,0.5);border-color:rgba(255,215,0,0.22)}.ds-btn-primary:focus-visible{outline:2px solid rgba(255,215,0,0.7);outline-offset:3px}.ds-btn-primary:active{transform:translateY(0) scale(.98)}

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Respectful alternate action for supporting routes.

components.name: Search Input
components.description: Dark, mobile-readable search field for finding names and meanings.
components.html: <label class="ds-search-wrap"><svg class="ds-search-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" aria-hidden="true"><circle cx="11" cy="11" r="8" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"></circle><path d="m21 21-4.35-4.35" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"></path></svg><input class="ds-search-input" type="text" placeholder="Search names or meanings..." aria-label="Search sacred names"></label>

components.name: Name Card
components.description: Primary devotional reading unit with revealable elaboration.
components.html:
#1

Mahākālī

The great dark Mother beyond time.
components.css: .ds-name-card{background:rgba(0,0,0,.55);background-image:radial-gradient(circle at center top,rgba(255,215,0,.08),transparent 42%),linear-gradient(rgba(255,255,255,.024),rgba(220,20,60,.04));color:var(--color-text-primary,#f5f5f5);border:1px solid rgba(220,20,60,.16);border-radius:16px;padding:24px;box-shadow:0 6px 18px rgba(0,0,0,.24);transition:transform .3s ease,box-shadow .3s ease,border-color .3s ease}.ds-name-card:hover{transform:translateY(-4px) scale(1.02);box-shadow:0 12px 34px rgba(0,0,0,.42),0 0 0 1px rgba(220,20,60,.22);border-color:rgba(255,215,0,.22)}.ds-name-meta{display:inline-block;margin-bottom:12px;color:#ffd700;font:600 .875rem/1.4 -apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,'Segoe UI',Roboto,Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif}.ds-name-title{margin:0 0 8px 0;font:700 1.375rem/1.3 Georgia,'Times New Roman',serif}.ds-name-summary{margin:0 0 16px 0;font:italic 400 .9375rem/1.6 -apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,'Segoe UI',Roboto,Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif}.ds-name-toggle{width:100%;padding:16px 20px;border-radius:12px;border:1px solid rgba(220,20,60,.12);background:linear-gradient(rgba(36,36,36,.96),rgba(28,28,28,.96));color:#f5f5f5;font:600 .9375rem/1.4 -apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,'Segoe UI',Roboto,Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif;cursor:pointer;transition:transform .15s ease,border-color .15s ease,background-color .15s ease}.ds-name-toggle:hover{border-color:rgba(255,215,0,.18)}.ds-name-toggle:focus-visible{outline:2px solid rgba(255,215,0,.7);outline-offset:3px}

components.name: Floating Navigation Button
components.description: Mobile-first floating movement control between landing and names section.
components.html: <button class="ds-nav-float" type="button" aria-label="Go to names"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" aria-hidden="true"><line x1="12" y1="5" x2="12" y2="19"></line><polyline points="19 12 12 19 5 12"></polyline></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-nav-float{width:56px;height:56px;border:none;border-radius:9999px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#dc143c 0%,#8b0000 100%);color:#fff;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;box-shadow:0 4px 18px rgba(220,20,60,.46),0 0 24px rgba(220,20,60,.2);cursor:pointer;transition:transform .3s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1),box-shadow .3s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1),opacity .3s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1)}.ds-nav-float svg{width:24px;height:24px;stroke:currentColor;stroke-width:2.5;fill:none}.ds-nav-float:hover{transform:scale(1.08);box-shadow:0 6px 24px rgba(220,20,60,.6),0 0 32px rgba(220,20,60,.32)}.ds-nav-float:focus-visible{outline:2px solid rgba(255,215,0,.7);outline-offset:3px}.ds-nav-float:active{transform:scale(.95)}

narrative.overview:
This system is a severe, timeless, ceremonial devotional surface. It is built for focus, not spectacle. The visual job is to hold attention on the names, the Goddess, and the act of reading, while creating an atmosphere that feels sacred and grounded rather than commercial or decorative.

The system uses darkness as an enclosure, crimson as invocation, and gold as consecration. Black is not emptiness here, it is sanctified space. Red is not generic urgency, it is Kali-associated force used with discipline. Gold is not luxury polish, it is ritual light. Typography stays modern and readable in the UI, then turns more devotional through serif emphasis where reverence matters.

This system explicitly rejects flashy or clickbait spiritual content, the generic modern SaaS site, noisy social-media aesthetic, dark horror or occult shock styling, and luxury-brand polish that feels commercial and detached from devotion.
keyCharacteristics: Ceremonial contrast with restrained accent use
Dark devotional atmosphere with selective sacred highlights

rules.name: The Consecrated Accent Rule
rules.body: Kali Crimson and Lamp Gold are sacred accents, not wallpaper. If a screen starts looking red-and-gold everywhere, it has lost devotional authority.

rules.name: The Legibility Before Mystique Rule
rules.body: If a type treatment feels more dramatic than readable on a phone, it is wrong. The site is devotional, but it is still a reading tool.

rules.name: The Atmosphere Before Object Rule
rules.body: Surfaces should feel held in darkness, not perched on top of it. If shadows start making components feel like generic product cards, reduce them.

dos: Do keep the names and devotional content visually dominant over every decorative effect.
Do use Kali Crimson (`#dc143c`) for primary emphasis, focus states, and key sacred actions only.
Do use Lamp Gold (`#ffd700`) as ritual illumination, not as constant ornament.
Do preserve strong contrast between Smoke Pearl (`#f5f5f5`) text and Shrine Black (`#0a0a0a`) or Night Surface (`#1a1a1a`) backgrounds.
Do keep controls touch-comfortable, rounded, and readable on mobile first.
Do let the interface feel severe, timeless, and ceremonial before it feels expressive.
donts: Don't make this feel like flashy or clickbait spiritual content.
Don't make this resemble a generic modern SaaS site.
Don't drift into a noisy social-media aesthetic.
Don't push the visuals into a dark horror or occult shock experience.
Don't polish it into luxury-brand commercial gloss.
Don't use accent colors so often that the page starts feeling red-and-gold by default.
Don't turn cards, glows, or blur into the main event. If someone notices the effect before the names, the hierarchy is broken.
